title: Neuroplexis Athernex Lab Maintenance
description: Every 6 hours, Neuroplexis reviews /home/charles/Documents/Software/github/lab on the development branch and performs a bounded maintenance pass. The expected implementation path is tools/neuroplexis_lab_maintenance.sh: create a task branch, run up to 5 non-interactive Codex cycles, verify after each cycle, collect evidence, and compact notes for the next cycle. Scope work to public-safe Project Athernex R&D improvements only: orchestration contracts, Kafka broker and power-scheduler modeling, Paperclip integration, Rust control-plane scaffolding, documentation, tests, and repo hygiene. Do not publish secrets, private topology, credentials, private network inventories, BMC/IPMI details, vendor-specific power runbooks, or destructive automation.

env.COMPONENT_AREA: public-safe orchestration, Kafka power scheduling, Paperclip integration, and repo hygiene
